label: Order Summary
description: Six KPIs showing total, open, partially filled, filled, rejected, and failed order counts.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget — wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: no any or @ts — ignore in widget file

0.5.note: widget file imports only from context and shared components

0.6.note: isLoading guard renders " — " for all metric values

0.7.note: KPI strip shows zeros when no orders (valid state for a summary strip)

0.8.note: added error guard: renders rose error message when context.error is set

0.9.note: no commented — out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.8: orders-data-context exposes error but the widget was not reading it. Added error early-return before metrics array.

1.1.note: reads summary and isLoading exclusively via useOrdersData()

1.2.note: orders — data — context.tsx line 145: useGlobalScope(); scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope

1.3.note: scopedOrders filters by scopeStrategyIds (org→client→strategy cascade) in context

1.5.note: strategyFilter state in context + scopeStrategyIds chain covers strategy — level scoping

1.7.note: widget itself has no reference data; context uses getOrdersForScope from lib/mocks/fixtures (read — only concern)

l1.notes: Context (read-only): imports from lib/mocks/fixtures and lib/mocks/generators are acceptable mock-data paths for dev mode; not a widget-file concern per spec.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings.description: Widget was not reading error from useOrdersData(). Added error guard returning a rose error message.
